subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: The capital of Rajasthan was founded by which Mughal emperor?
question_hi: राजस्थान की राजधानी के मुगल मुख्यालय किस मुगल सरकारी ने बनाया ?
explanation_en: Akbar the Great, a Mughal Emperor, founded the capital of Rajasthan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the current population of Rajasthan?
A_en: As of 2021, the population of Rajasthan is estimated to be around 33 million.
